headline: Illinois Tool Works Governance Push Highlights Board Accountability And Rich Valuation
summary: Shareholder John Chevedden has submitted a proposal to Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) seeking stricter rules for directors who do not receive majority support. The proposal calls for any such director to leave the board within 9 months of the vote. This governance push is set to be considered ahead of ITW's upcoming annual meeting. Illinois Tool Works, a diversified industrial manufacturer, touches a wide range of end markets, so board oversight and governance often sit under a bright...
